summary: Raw, candid vertical phone footage of an ICE agent in a tactical vest handing out bottled water from a cooler/wagon to families and travelers at an airport curbside drop-off, framed as agents 'helping keep TSA lines moving.' Ambient audio of casual conversation about water; no music, narration, or cinematic editing, so it is lightly-edited B-roll rather than a produced spectacle.
notable_text: tweet: 'Huge thanks to our ICE agents deployed at airports nationwide... True patriots'
